sections.paragraph:
unused in Kal. Syr. ܛܦܚܰ to spread out. Cogn. צָפַח.

Piel טִפַּח-

(1) to spread out, to expand, as the heaven, Isa 48:13.

(2) to carry little children on the palms (in Latin it is expressed in ulnis [Engl. to carry in the arms]); denom. from טֶפַח No. 1, Lam 2:22.

Derivatives, מִטְפַּחַת, and the words immediately following.
